title: Closing Price Prompt Run Record
description: Tracks a single external model generation run triggered by a prompt record. One run record per batch of outputs from one model call.

run_id.description: Unique run identifier. Format: RUN_{scene_id}_{MODEL_ABBREV}_{counter:04d} or RUN_{scene_id}_{clip_id}_{MODEL_ABBREV}_{counter:04d} for manifest-driven clip runs.

prompt_id.description: The prompt record that triggered this run.

model_guidance_snapshot.description: Path to the model guidance snapshot used for this run (if dynamic_snapshot mode).

run_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the run was initiated.

outputs_expected.description: Number of output images or clips expected from this run.

cost.description: Credit or token cost for this run.

value.description: Numeric cost value in the specified unit.

error_note.description: Human note on error, populated when status=error.
